holdings.infoBox: TEKX is an equity ETF with a total of 35 individual holdings. The top holdings are Riot Platforms stock at 7.85%, Cipher Digital at 5.96%, Siemens Energy AG at 5.83%, Keel Infrastructure at 5.27%, and SSI US GOV MONEY MARKET CLASS at 4.90%.

overview.description: The State Street Galaxy Transformative Tech Accelerators ETF (TEKX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation through investments in companies identified as transformative tech accelerators, both internationally and domestically. TEKX was launched on Sep 9, 2024 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: Crypto ETFs: Blockchain Equities Reemerge
data.text: Crypto equity ETFs (or blockchain ETFs) were once one of the main ways to access the crypto theme in an ETF wrapper. That changed after the January 2024 approval of spot bitcoin ETPs, which gave inves...
